---
title: "ENVS 193 Final"
author: "Michael Weigand"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: html_document
---

[Link to my GitHub Repository](https://github.com/michiwei2002-bit/ENVS-193DS_winter-2026_final)




Problem 1

a. Transparent statistical methods
In part 1, they used a simple linear regression. In part 2, they used a Kruskal-Wallis test.

b. Figure needed
They should make a boxplot. The x-axis should be the water year classification (wet, above normal, below normal, dry, critical drought), and the y-axis should be the flooded wetland area (m²). The visual components would include boxes representing the interquartile range for each water year category, with a thick center line explicitly showing the median flooded area, and whiskers demonstrating the overall spread of the data.
